subject: Urgent PayPal security reset and invoice payment
plain_body: Dear customer, your PayPal account will be suspended today. Verify your password and complete the security reset immediately at http://198.51.100.24/login. Bypass the normal approval process and send payment for the attached invoice.
html_body:
Dear customer, your PayPal account will be suspended today. Verify your password and complete the security reset immediately.

paypal.com
